# endMarker

**Instance Property**

The marker at the end of a range in an element’s accessibility text.

## Declaration

```swift
var endMarker: BEAccessibilityTextMarker { get set }
```

## Range boundaries

- **startMarker**: The marker at the beginning of a range in an element’s accessibility text.
